title: Smoke's Aurora Ice and Fire
description: Ice and Fire and Create seek your Adventure
body:
The versatile Create experience, reborn in frost and flame.

Forged from the dreams of our adventurers: a pack that unites the craftsmanship of Create 6 with the mystique of ancient magic, the might of enchanted weapons, and the thrill of discovery across frozen peaks and fiery depths.
Over fifty outdated relics have been replaced with carefully chosen, lore-rich innovations.

What awaits you:

Arcane balance: A seamless fusion of engineering, sorcery, and exploration. Build clockwork fortresses powered by elemental energy—or wield blades kissed by fire and frost.

Refined performance: Optimized for smooth campaigns, even when your realm grows vast and your allies many.

A new age of wonder: Forget what you knew of gears and steel. Embrace magic, invention, and mystery to forge your own legend.

We are in open beta—which means: venture forth, experiment, and share your wisdom. Help us shape Smoke Aurora: Realms of Ice and Fire into the next grand chapter of creation.

Updates and expansions await, as ever. The forge burns bright—be part of the saga. 

If you have futher quastions visit us at https://discord.gg/rYgnXMxEGn
